title: Baby Don't Herd Me
description: Herding livestock with sticks and dogs
body:
This mod is there for all your shepherd needs!

Move livestock (sheep, cows and chickens) with a crook instead of luring them everywhere! 🐑

Let your canine friends help you by letting them keep your flock together! 🐕

And if you want them to stop, whistle them back to you 😗
You can also whistle to communicate with others or just for fun!

There are whistle commands for "Go" and "Recall"

Enjoy the mod and I'd love to hear your feedback and about any bugs you found!
https://github.com/2ndDerivative/BabyDontHerdMe
